headline: KLA (KLAC) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: At this time, I would like to welcome everyone to the KLA Corporation March Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call.  KLA delivered strong results across the board for the March quarter with revenue of $3.415 billion, up 4% sequentially and 11% year-over-year driven by increased investment in leading-edge foundry logic and high bandwidth memory.
